title: Making Amends
profile: You are corresponding with Emery Penderghast, an ex-lover who left you a month ago after deciding that you weren't committed to the relationship.

You are writing to win back Emery and to explain that you have changed and are more committed than ever. You need to persuade Emery that you both have a future and give examples as to how your life is without your love.

rulesOfCorrespondence.description: Emery likes when people are straightforward with their correspondence. You are unable to use any skills in this letter.

consequences.text: Emery writes back, believing that you are worse than ever and that there is no hint of sincerity in your writing. You receive no further correspondence.
Emery's heart is softened by your words, but cannot be with you. Emery is happy to be friends with you.
You receive a heartfelt letter from Emery, admitting that you have changed and that you both should meet by the fountain on Monday evening to rekindle your love.
You receive no correspondence. Instead, a few days after sending, you receive a knock at your door. Emery stands there and you both embrace. You marry within the month.
